description: Style NoteLightweight yet loaded with high octane style, this pair of flip flops from converse shows why the brand has a cult following among the youth. Super comfy and styled minimally, this is a summer closet essential.Product Details Red flip flops with branded rubber thong style straps Red textured footbed with 'All Star' printFoamy rubber outsole with reverse waffle pattern groovesMaterial and CareRubberWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
